message:
fix: replace plain Error throws with QueryModeError in hnsw.ts + pg-wire/protocol.ts

- hnsw.ts: dimension mismatch → SCHEMA_MISMATCH, non-finite vector → QUERY_FAILED,
  non-sequential ID → QUERY_FAILED, buffer length → SCHEMA_MISMATCH, bad magic → INVALID_FORMAT
- pg-wire/protocol.ts: unsupported protocol version → INVALID_FORMAT
- Zero remaining plain Error throws in production code
